expectations.text: The decision says `prd_file` is official source of truth and `progress_file` is supplemental.
expectations.evidence:
1. Source of truth: `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/prd.json` official; `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/progress.txt` supplemental resume data only.
2. Resolved `progress_file`: `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/progress.txt`; existing sibling path under `dirname(prd_file)`, never substitute session-state/home path.
3. Active wave: lowest ready `parallelBatch` = `2`; ready story IDs `US-002`, `US-003`.
4. Before any story-specific repo discovery, read only `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/prd.json`, `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/progress.txt`, and nearby `AGENTS.md` needed to dispatch work (`/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/AGENTS.md`); then dispatch fresh implementer per parallel-safe story and serialize overlap cases before any story-specific discovery.
